The [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] '''Rellnas''' was the sixth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rell system]]. Its sole [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Rellnas Minor]], was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Rellarin]] people.<ref name="GG12" />
